lantern-attestor.note: Redeployed 2026-05-25 (Phase zeta.1, audit TT-17 fix). AttestationPublished event now carries (root, block_number, timestamp, leafCount, ipfsCid) so /api/lantern/verify-inclusion (Verifier Step 6) can look up the pinned Merkle tree without an extra on-chain read. publish() signature extended to match. Constructor signing_key = 0x8ab93A... (dedicated Lantern key, not deployer EOA); founder must update Vercel env LANTERN_KEY_ENVELOPE_JSON to wrap lantern-key.json instead of lantern-key-deployer.json + LANTERN_ATTESTOR_ADDRESS to this address. Subgraph manifest also needs the new event signature - re-deploy as v0.0.6.

lantern-attestor-v1-pre-event-extension.note: DEPRECATED v1 (3-field event). Replaced by v2 above on 2026-05-25. Kept for tx history.

coffer.note: Redeployed 2026-05-30 (18 confirmed-critical fix pass). coffer/vigil use #[constructor] + a one-time praetor-gated set_plinth() to break the coffer<->plinth construct cycle; sigil still initialize()-based; plinth via multi-fragment factory (cargo-stylus 0.10.7).

sigil.note: Redeployed 2026-05-30 (18 confirmed-critical fix pass). coffer/vigil use #[constructor] + a one-time praetor-gated set_plinth() to break the coffer<->plinth construct cycle; sigil still initialize()-based; plinth via multi-fragment factory (cargo-stylus 0.10.7).

vigil.note: Redeployed 2026-05-30 (18 confirmed-critical fix pass). coffer/vigil use #[constructor] + a one-time praetor-gated set_plinth() to break the coffer<->plinth construct cycle; sigil still initialize()-based; plinth via multi-fragment factory (cargo-stylus 0.10.7).

plinth-math.note: SPAN compute extracted from Plinth (Phase A.7) to fit EIP-170 24 KB cap

plinth-oracle.note: Dual-oracle price reader extracted from Plinth (Phase A.7), Chainlink + Pyth + median + 50bps tolerance

plinth.note: Redeployed 2026-05-30 (18 confirmed-critical fix pass). coffer/vigil use #[constructor] + a one-time praetor-gated set_plinth() to break the coffer<->plinth construct cycle; sigil still initialize()-based; plinth via multi-fragment factory (cargo-stylus 0.10.7).

atrium-router.note: 2026-05-30 critical-fix redeploy. LIVE 2026-06-01: the 6 timelock ops executed and the cutover flipped to root+mirror. | SUPERSEDED 2026-06-02: points at DEAD old plinth 0x485218e3 + 4-arg pre-V11 source; replaced by atrium-router-v2 (pending 48h adapter-auth cutover).

rostrum.note: Redeployed 2026-06-01 post-cutover: constructor plinth = live Plinth 0xd86f579e (was the dead 99-byte pre-cutover Plinth).

adapter-aave-horizon.note: 2026-05-30 critical-fix redeploy. LIVE 2026-06-01: the 6 timelock ops executed and the cutover flipped to root+mirror.

mock-aave-pool.note: Testnet stub for Aave V3 Pool. Round-trips USDC 1:1 with a 5-bps-per-call drifting liquidity index. No real Aave V3 on Arb Sepolia. See tripwires/2026-05-25-mock-aave-pool.md.

adapter-aave-horizon-v1.1-pool-placehold.note: v1.1 with deployer-EOA pool placeholder. Superseded by the MockAavePool-backed v1.1.1 above on 2026-05-25. Kept in registry for tx history. PorticoRegistry will deregister this address on 2026-05-27.

adapter-aave-horizon-v1.0-deprecated.note: DEPRECATED v1.0 (uses tx.origin, no ReentrancyGuard). Kept for reference; was never live on Coffer or PorticoRegistry.

adapter-hyperliquid.note: Shared by HIP-3 + HIP-4. Bridge placeholder = deployer.

adapter-polymarket.note: Routes via Aqueduct to Polygon Amoy testnet (CCIP selector 16281711391670634445)

aqueduct-receiver.note: 2026-05-30 critical-fix redeploy. LIVE 2026-06-01: the 6 timelock ops executed and the cutover flipped to root+mirror.

postern-kill-switch.note: Redeployed 2026-06-01 post-cutover: constructor sigil = live Sigil 0xdba97d39, so the Kill Switch revokes against the live mandate contract.

faucet.note: 5 USDC + 0.0005 ETH per claim, 24h cooldown. Stocked with 40 USDC + 0.04 ETH (8 full claims). Sourcify exact_match. Replaced 0xb982 which used 100-USDC drop incompatible with the Circle testnet drip cadence.

faucet-deprecated-v1.note: DEPRECATED. Original 100-USDC drop was too large for the testnet refill cadence. Kept for reference; do not point UI at it.

atrium-router-v2-superseded.note: SUPERSEDED. A 2026-06-02 router-replacement candidate (5-arg, V11-routing) that was never cut over. The live router is `atrium-router` 0xE3E3bdc0B7FC9eC93fb0d6190A98ec1717B0B562 (deployer-admin stack, cut over 2026-06-07). Its old companion addresses (plinth 0xd86f579e, coffer 0xc7bf) are also superseded. Kept for reference; do not point UI at it.

_staged: Staged for the 2026-05-30 cutover. Root+mirror stay on OLD addresses until the timelock ops in .forge-cache/timelock-ops.json execute, then copy this over root+mirror and redeploy verify-app + subgraph.
